hero.subtitle: Building complete digital experiences — from database to interface. .NET, Vue 3, and applied AI.

about.label: About Me
about.bio1: My career in technology began with a Computer Science degree, later redirected toward Systems Analysis and Development. In parallel, I pursued continuous learning through courses, blogs, specialized articles, and especially personal projects.
about.bio2: From there, I was hired as a Quality Assurance engineer, responsible for system quality through detailed analysis and automated testing — a project I built from the ground up. I held this role for nearly four years, building a solid foundation in best practices, test automation, and software quality.
about.bio3: After that journey, I had the opportunity to work as a junior fullstack developer, which is the position I currently hold.

items.name: Minoru
items.description: Full-stack productivity and personal finance app. Blog, Kanban, finances, AI-powered study sessions, Google OAuth authentication and PDF generation.

items.name:
Federal Tax Revenue Analysis
in Brazil (2000–2024)
items.description: Exploratory and descriptive analysis of federal tax revenue data in Brazil, identifying trends, state/year variations, and the main factors influencing federal tax collection.

Acted as a Software Quality Analyst, actively collaborating with development teams in the validation, analysis, and continuous improvement of systems.
Performed manual testing and supported test automation using Cypress, contributing to the stability and quality of applications.
Analyzed demands and issues reported by clients, interpreted scenarios, and proposed solutions in conjunction with the teams.
Manipulated data in SQL databases, including corrections and validations based on information from external APIs.
Developed scripts and bots to automate repetitive tasks, optimizing internal processes and increasing team productivity.
Participated in technical meetings, suggesting improvements to workflows, processes, and software quality.

Worked on the development and maintenance of web applications using Vue.js and .NET with Entity Framework.
Experienced with code versioning using Git and the use of Docker for standardization and secure development environments.
Constantly acted in code maintenance and refactoring, focusing on quality, readability, and best practices.
Utilized tools such as SonarQube for code quality analysis.
Worked in an agile environment, using Scrum for task organization and continuous delivery of solutions.
Collaborated with internal teams on the support and evolution of systems used by different companies within the group.
